chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1677 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.286/2024 (I Rule 10 CPC) 3. For orders on CMA No.287/2024 (I Rule 10 CPC) 4. For hearing of CMA No.1375/2024 (I Rule 10 CPC) 5. For hearing of CMA No.7213/2023 (S/A) 6. For hearing of main case 30.05.2024 Syed Sardar Hussain Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Jamshed Ahmed Faiz, Advocate for intervenors. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG Sindh has filed a notification dated 3rd April, 2024, showing respondent No.8, Asghar Ali Pathan, has been transferred as Joint Director Labour, South Division, Karachi, and Abdul Samad Soomro, Joint Director Labour, Sukkur Region, present, has been posted as Registrar of Trade Union u/s 15 and Conciliator u/s 36 of Industrial Relations Act, 2013, and has taken over charge of office of respondent No.8. The said officer has filed a statement along with certain documents, and submits that main grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, which has been confirmed by learned counsel for petitioner and petitioner in person. In view of above, since this petition has served its purpose is accordingly disposed of along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
